Notice Of Motion Compelling Further Responses To Discovery From Deft. Chandru C. Gurnani And Sangeeta C. Gurnani Both, Individually And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery From Chandru C. Gurnani and Sangeeta C. Gurnani is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $636.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
